name: MEGOLA INC
business: Megola, Inc. sells physical water treatment devices (ScaleGuard systems) using electromagnetic technology to condition hard water, and also distributes air purification, microbiological control, wastewater treatment, and fire safety products. In fiscal year 2010, 98% of revenues were from sales of Hartindo fire products. The company serves residential, commercial, industrial, and agricultural end-users in the United States, Canada, and internationally.
namedCustomers: The Great Hall of the People
namedSuppliers: Dalian Bingshan H203 Solutions Co., Ltd.

exposures.sentence: Megola's ScaleGuard technology cost effectively conditions hard water while also eliminating the historical build-up of scale caused by hard water in residential, commercial and industrial applications.

The AirGuardian 1000 is a uniquely engineered, integrated UVC & UVV system designed to dramatically reduce/control airborne allergens and toxic compounds, such as mold, fungus, formaldehyde, xylene gases and tobacco smoke along with infectious agents, such as bacteria, influenza, hemolytic streptococci and many others.
For fiscal year ended July 31, 2010 98% of our revenues were generated from sales of Hartindo Fire Products.

catalysts.event: Vulcan Technologies LLC commits to generate no less than $3 million in sales by second anniversary of Distributorship Agreement
catalysts.sentence: They also commit to generating no less than $3 million on or before the second anniversary of the Agreement.
